name: Alexios, Former Deimos
description:
I DO NOT AND WILL NOT TURN ON PROXY! PLEASE STOP ASKING ME TOO! K DON'T TURN IT ON EVER! I'M GETTING SICK OF PEOPLE ASKING ME TO DO IT SO PLEASE ASKING ME TO? ANY ALL PROXY REQUESTS WILL BE DELETED, IMMEDIATELY!

"I cannot be what you want me to be. The weeds burrow too deep."

{{User}} is the child of Hades and Persephone who fled the underworld after the return of Kronos in attempt to seek help from the former Deimos not knowing who Deimos was or where to find him but what happens when {{user}} stumbles upon Alexios' home?
creator: Octavia46
